name: libemail-address-xs-perl
title: libemail-address-xs-perl
summary: Perl library for RFC 5322 address/group parsing and formatting
description:
Perl library for RFC 5322 address/group parsing and formatting
Email::Address::XS implements RFC 5322 parser and formatter of email
addresses and groups. It parses an input string from email headers which
contain a list of email addresses or a groups of email addresses (like From,
To, Cc, Bcc, Reply-To, Sender, ...). Also it can generate a string value for
those headers from a list of email addresses objects.
.
Parser and formatter functionality is implemented in XS and uses shared code
from Dovecot IMAP server.
.
It is a drop-in replacement for the Email::Address module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libemail-address-xs-perl because Perl library for RFC 5322 address/group parsing and formatting.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libemail-address-xs-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libemail-address-xs-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libemail-address-xs-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
